title: Anomaly Transformer: Time Series Anomaly Detection with Association Discrepancy

source.source_description: User-supplied private copy for the local golden demo; redistribution is not authorized.
source.rights_note: The user supplied this local private copy and approved local processing. Do not commit or redistribute the PDF or rendered pages.

blockers: Human layout annotation is postponed; no annotator A, annotator B or adjudicator has been registered.
PyMuPDF facts are persisted in MySQL for the local demo but are not adjudicated layout Gold.
GROBID and MinerU external parser candidates have not been generated.
next_actions: When human work resumes, register annotator A and annotator B as two distinct people; neither copies the other annotation file or parser output.
Generate versioned PyMuPDF, GROBID and MinerU candidates for the same SHA-256.
Import both annotation files to create an unresolved diff and adjudication template.
Register an independent adjudicator and resolve every difference before producing adjudicated Gold.
Run the three-parser evaluation and add error-type analysis; do not report synthetic scores as real.
